title: Luffy Runs Out of Time
description: Luffy’s Gear Fourth backlash leaves him vulnerable while the Birdcage keeps closing.
scene: On pages 2–6, Luffy, Doflamingo, Viola, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Beating the living crap out of...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Who in the world is that guy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The plateau on which the Royal Palace is located, sunflower field

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Did you see that!? Is that really Straw Hat!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So he still had an ace up his sleeve, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: So they've gone and moved the party some- where else, eh!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Should I follow 'em... or just wait here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: So Jesus Burgess really is going for Luffy-Kun and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: All we have remaining is Luffy and "his" final battle, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There are no executives left standing save Doflamingo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We've destroyed enough of its internal systems already!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The outer wall of the factory is made of sea stone. There's no way a thread made by a devil fruit user could...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Oi, zero! Kin'emon! The center of the country is that way!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: If you're tryna run, you're going in the exact opposite direction!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: We're off to try and stop those threads! We might be able to buy everyone some time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Stop them? I hadn't even thought of that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Central District Luffy vs. Dofla- Mingo

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: So he's freely controlling the expansion and contraction of his rubber with arrangement* Haki...

summary: This part focuses on luffy runs out of time, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
